Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-python3, dh-sequence-sphinxdoc <!nodoc>, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-click <!ocheck>, python3-fqdn <!nocheck>, python3-hatchling, python3-idna <!nocheck>, python3-isoduration <!nocheck>, python3-json-pointer <!nocheck>, python3-jsonschema (>= 4.18.0) <!nocheck>, python3-myst-parser <!nodoc>, python3-packaging, python3-pydata-sphinx-theme <!nodoc>, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-pytest-asyncio <!nocheck>, python3-pytest-console-scripts <!nocheck>, python3-pythonjsonlogger (>= 3.0.0) <!nocheck>, python3-referencing <!nocheck>, python3-rfc3339-validator <!nocheck>, python3-rfc3986-validator <!nocheck>, python3-rich <!nocheck>, python3-sphinx <!nodoc>, python3-sphinxcontrib.spelling <!nodoc>, python3-traitlets <!nocheck>, python3-uritemplate <!nocheck>, python3-webcolors <!nocheck>, python3-yaml <!nocheck>
Description: Event system for Jupyter applications and extensions Jupyter Events is a configurable event system that enables Jupyter Python Applications (e.g. Jupyter Server, JupyterLab Server, JupyterHub, etc.) to emit events-structured data describing things happening inside the application. Other software (e.g. client applications like JupyterLab) can listen and respond to these events.
Package-List: python-jupyter-events-doc deb doc optional arch=all profile=!nodoc profile:v1=!nodoc python3-jupyter-events deb python optional arch=all
